name: Impossible Greek Spinach Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the chopped green onions in butter until softened.
2. Add the thawed and drained spinach to the pan and stir until combined.
3. Grease a baking dish.
4. In the prepared dish, layer the spinach mixture with cottage cheese.
5. Combine the remaining ingredients (lemon juice, pepper, Parmesan cheese, and nutmeg) in a blender and mix well.
6. Pour the blended ingredients over the casserole.
7. Bake at 350°F for about 35 minutes, or until a knife inserted into the center comes out clean.
